channel.title: flove making-of — identity questions
channel.description: New identity design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: When are identity masks (multiple personae per user) needed?
item.description:
• F2 (early) — Masks from the start — more complex identity model, but privacy-first from day one. • F5 (late) — Masks later — simpler identity first, add pseudonymity when the network has enough users. • Not needed — Skip masks — one identity per user, full transparency. Simpler but less private.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: F5 (late)
